title: phlegmariurus mandiocanus
intro: Phlegmariurus mandiocanus, also known as the 'Mandioqueira' or 'Venus Hair Fern', is a species of plant in the lycopodiaceae family, characterized by its unique, hair-like leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus mandiocanus include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and skin regeneration. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile and valuable herbal remedy.
